summary: Iteration 2 verifies all 5 new enhancements: cinematic intro, portal transitions, candlelight mode, per-world typography, and magnetic interactions (via hooks). Backend (3/3 pytest) and Frontend (all new + previously verified testids) fully pass. Cinematic intro shows on first visit, is dismissed by intro-skip, persists intro_seen in sessionStorage, and does not re-render on reload. Portal buttons (portal-professional/personal/emotional and gateway-recruiter-link) are <button> elements that trigger transition-expand overlay immediately, defer URL change ~700ms, then show transition-fade after navigation. Professional heading Typewriter types 'Data. Clarity. Initiative.', Personal HandwrittenReveal shows all three words (Warm./Deep./Human.), candlelight toggle on /emotional switches overlay + label (Read by candlelight ⇄ Lights on). emotional-signoff reads '— Hemanth'. World-switcher hidden on /recruiter. Resume PDF download intact.
observations: Typewriter component renders an inline <style> block inside the target span, so textContent includes CSS text ('@keyframes tw-blink ...'). Visually it renders correctly as 'Data. Clarity. Initiative.' — no functional impact, but consider moving the <style> out of the testid element or injecting via a <style> at component root so automation reading textContent gets clean text.
Emotional page still renders 20 paragraphs (para-0..para-19). Spec mentions 19. Unchanged from iteration 1; raise as spec vs impl mismatch only, not a defect.
CinematicIntro has no keyboard escape (only the Skip button and the completion timer); acceptable for MVP but nice-to-have for accessibility.
action_items: Optional: Move Typewriter's inline <style>{@keyframes tw-blink...} out of the data-testid span to avoid CSS appearing in element.textContent for tests/screen-readers.
Optional: Reconcile emotional paragraph count (20 vs spec 19).
critical_code_review_comments: TransitionOverlay navigates via useEffect timeout; good. However, if trigger is called twice quickly (double-click), setState in the expanding branch navigates twice; consider guarding phase transitions against repeated 'expanding' trigger.
CinematicIntro types character-by-character using setInterval (42ms) for ~46 chars (~2s) + 1.1s dwell + 0.7s fade ≈ 4s total; consider prefers-reduced-motion handling.
Typewriter injects a <style> block inside the rendered span (makes element.textContent dirty).
App.js composes DimensionContext + TransitionContext providers cleanly; good. server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — migrate to lifespan.
useMagnetic hook (not deeply E2E-tested here) attaches mousemove listeners per-element; ensure cleanup on unmount to avoid listener leaks.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_pytest_client status_check via POST /api/status during round-trip test (harmless diagnostic collection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_life_portfolio_api.py (3 tests, all passing). Run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. All new testids verified: cinematic-intro, intro-sentence, intro-skip, transition-expand, transition-fade, prof-heading, prof-heading-tw, personal-heading, candlelight-toggle, candlelight-overlay. When testing routes other than /, either set sessionStorage.intro_seen='1' before navigation or click intro-skip first. Portal buttons are <button> elements; expect transition-expand overlay for ~700ms before URL changes, then transition-fade during 800ms fade-out. Typewriter textContent includes embedded keyframes CSS string; use `contains 'Data. Clarity. Initiative.'` rather than strict equality.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 5 enhancement features verified end-to-end. Portal click → transition-expand → route change at ~700ms → transition-fade works as designed. Candlelight toggle ON/OFF correctly mounts/unmounts overlay and flips label. Intro gated by sessionStorage works across reload.
